meta.title: Netherlands vs Argentina — Quarter-finals
meta.trigger_label: Second half — Netherlands locked at 2-2, a moment of brilliance needed

context: A tense moment in this quarter-finals match. Netherlands and Argentina are locked at 2-2. One tactical shift could be the difference between glory and heartbreak.

options.label: A
options.action: Make an attacking substitution to break the deadlock

options.label: B
options.action: Push the full-backs higher, create overloads out wide

options.label: C
options.action: Stay patient, maintain shape, look for a moment of magic

options.label: D
options.action: Go ultra-attacking — bring on an extra striker

real_decision.description: The match went to penalties after a 2-2 draw. Nahuel Molina Lucero (34'), Lionel Andrés Messi Cuccittini (72'), Wout Weghorst (82'), Wout Weghorst (100').

pre_generated_explanations.A:
**OPTION A — Make an attacking substitution to break the deadlock**
Risk level: High. This is the positive choice. An attacking substitution signals intent and can break the deadlock. In the context of this quarter-finals match between Netherlands and Argentina (2-2), this option addresses the tactical challenge but requires precise execution from the players on the pitch.
pre_generated_explanations.B:
**OPTION B — Push the full-backs higher, create overloads out wide**
Risk level: Medium. This is the width-based approach. Overlapping full-backs create numerical advantages in wide areas. In the context of this quarter-finals match between Netherlands and Argentina (2-2), this option addresses the tactical challenge but requires precise execution from the players on the pitch.
pre_generated_explanations.C:
**OPTION C — Stay patient, maintain shape, look for a moment of magic**
Risk level: Medium. This is the patient choice. Maintaining shape avoids risk but may not be enough to win. In the context of this quarter-finals match between Netherlands and Argentina (2-2), this option addresses the tactical challenge but requires precise execution from the players on the pitch.
pre_generated_explanations.D:
**OPTION D — Go ultra-attacking — bring on an extra striker**
Risk level: Very High. This is the all-out attacking option. An extra striker increases goal threat but sacrifices midfield control. In the context of this quarter-finals match between Netherlands and Argentina (2-2), this option addresses the tactical challenge but requires precise execution from the players on the pitch.
